message:
test(timeline): add 32 edge-case tests for Timeline animation state machine (bd-nq7yt)

Cover Default trait, zero-duration clamping to 1ns, then() on empty timeline,
pause/resume no-ops for wrong states, seek from Idle/Finished→Paused transitions,
seek from Playing stays Playing, overshoot when finished, tick no-ops in
Idle/Paused/Finished states, multiple events at same offset, auto-computed
duration, explicit duration override, seek_label on empty timeline,
event_value_at(0) on empty, LoopCount::Times(0), LoopCount/PlaybackState
eq/clone, play-after-stop reset, seek-past-end→finish, progress clamping,
is_complete while playing, reset from Finished/Paused, labeled event value,
events sorted by offset verification, debug format fields, loop overshoot carry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
